differences.title: 1. PRIMARY FOCUS
differences.leftDesc: Built for dynamic, interactive web applications with server-side rendering and routing.
differences.rightDesc: Optimized for static content, performance, and easy content management.

differences.title: 2. REACTIVITY
differences.leftDesc: Leverages Solid's reactive primitive for highly efficient UI updates.
differences.rightDesc: Hydrates components on demand, minimizing JavaScript payload.

differences.title: 3. ROUTING
differences.leftDesc: Integrated routing system for defining application routes based on file structure.
differences.rightDesc: File-based routing to create pages and API endpoints easily.

differences.title: 4. SERVER SIDE
differences.leftDesc: Robust server-side rendering, data fetching, and API endpoint creation.
differences.rightDesc: Supports serverless functions for dynamic behavior and API routes.

differences.title: 5. JS BUNDLING
differences.leftDesc: Fast development server and build process powered by Vite.
differences.rightDesc: Leverages Vite for a quick development experience and optimized builds.

differences.title: 6. FRAMEWORK INTEGRATION
differences.leftDesc: Deep integration with the React ecosystem.
differences.rightDesc: Supports React, Vue, Svelte, and others with UI framework flexibility.

differences.title: 7. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Optimized for dynamic apps, efficient updates with fine-grained reactivity.
differences.rightDesc: Prioritizes minimal JS, fast initial load for content-heavy sites.
